channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Microsoft Drops Support for Remote Desktop App, Transition to Windows App Required
item.description: Microsoft is dropping support for the Remote Desktop app on May 27, replacing it with a new unified gateway called Windows App. Users will need to manually uninstall and reinstall the new app to continue accessing services like Windows 365 and Azure Virtual Desktop.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: The Future of Search: Cloudflare's CEO on Reshaping the Internet
item.description: Cloudflare's Matthew Prince discusses the evolving search landscape and its impact on media companies and creators, proposing a three-step solution to address the issue.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
